item.title: LogicGrid 10.1.2
item.description:
LogicGrid 10.1.2

New

  • 32nds added as a subdivision option
  • Fully zoomed line skipping: Show all / Skip every other / Skip 3 in a row / Skip 7 in a row
  • Independent Alternate line opacity toggle — stacks with skip patterns

Changed

  • Watchdog no longer force-quits LogicGrid when the main thread appears unresponsive. Captures a stack trace dump to ~/Library/Application Support/LogicGrid/ instead — send these to the developer if you experience hangs.
